metadata.description: DTC marketing plugin — campaign planning with promo economics, email/SMS retention flows, audience-adaptive ad creative, brand voice with buyer psychology, competitive intelligence, and contribution-margin-first performance reporting. Works across product types (consumable, durable, fashion, subscription) and audience segments.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: DTC marketing plugin with promo calendar economics, email/SMS flows adapted by product type and buyer psychology, ad creative frameworks with audience-adaptive messaging, brand onboarding with buyer psychology profiles, competitive intelligence with category creation analysis, SEO audits with novel product strategy, and contribution-margin-first performance reporting.
